name: Homebrew Packages
description: Installs a list of Homebrew packages.

packages.description: Space-separated list of Homebrew packages to install. A specific version can be pinned per package with '@', e.g. "typescript wget@1.21".

installation_flags.description: Additional installation flags. These would be used as extra arguments to the brew command (`brew install <installation_flags> <package>@<version>`)
